summary: End-to-end validation of the new unified Admin Control Center + JWT login + live settings propagation + Brain widget 'I am admin' trigger + Customs Trade Terms tab + Maintenance mode. All 7 review-request items PASS. Site fully restored to clean state (accent #00C2FF, all features ON, maintenance OFF, serviceRates {}).

ui_bugs.issue: Username and password inputs lack data-testid attributes (only the submit button has data-testid='admin-login-submit'). Tests had to fall back to placeholder='Admin ID' / placeholder='Password'. Recommend adding data-testid='admin-login-username' and 'admin-login-password' for selector stability.

action_items: [Optional/Low] Add data-testid='admin-login-username' and data-testid='admin-login-password' to the AdminLogin form inputs in /app/frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminDashboard.jsx for more robust test selectors.
critical_code_review_comments: JWT auth flow is clean: POST /api/auth/admin/login returns token (144 chars, role=superadmin), wrong creds return 401, token stored in localStorage as ln_admin_jwt and sent as Authorization: Bearer for all admin endpoints — verified via network observation.

PUT /api/admin/settings round-trips correctly and GET /api/settings reflects changes immediately (no caching issue). SettingsContext re-fetches on focus/interval, so public pages pick up the new accentColor / feature toggles within ~2s without a hard reload.

Nav.jsx hides toggled-off features cleanly — verified by toggling Blog OFF: nav-menu-item-blog disappeared from the Learn dropdown; toggling back ON restored it (items observed: academy, blog, trade-news).
Layout.jsx maintenance gate correctly shows data-testid='maintenance-screen' on '/' while /admin-cms remains fully accessible — verified by enabling maintenance from Control Center.
BrainWidget.jsx 'I am admin' trigger navigates to /admin-login as expected from public homepage. Widget is correctly hidden on /admin* and /brain routes.

CustomsCompliance Trade Terms tab loads Incoterms (EXW, FOB, CFR, CIF, CIP, DAP, DDP), Payment Terms, Cargo Insurance, and Key Trade Terms sections from /api/customs/trade-terms — all content present.
Leads CSV export link uses ?token=<jwt> query param and returns HTTP 200 — backward compat with JWT auth in query verified.
Service rate override (cc-rate-rcmc-registration='INR 9,999 (test)') correctly persisted and round-tripped via /api/settings.serviceRates.

MINOR DX: The Brain admin tab (admin-tab-brain) navigates the user to /admin/brain (a separate page) which then no longer contains the other admin-tab-* buttons — to switch back to other tabs the user must click 'Back to CMS'. Functional, but the tab no longer behaves like an inline tab — consider either making it inline or visually distinguishing it as an outbound link to avoid confusion.

MINOR: AdminDashboard JSX gives all <button> elements type='submit' by default (observed via DOM inspection — every tab/feature button reported type='submit'). Not breaking anything today because they're not in a <form>, but should be type='button' to avoid accidental form submission if ever placed inside one.
test_credentials: Admin ID 00001 / password Shiv@12345 — verified working, JWT returned and accepted.
seed_data_creation: None (used existing seed). Temporarily wrote serviceRates.rcmc-registration='INR 9,999 (test)' during testing, cleared at end. Final settings: accent #00C2FF, maintenance false, all 9 features true, serviceRates {}.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Control Center is fully wired. Useful testids: admin-login-submit, admin-tab-{dashboard|cms|leads|service-requests|events|control-center|brain}, admin-stat-{countries|products|corridors|hsn_codes|industries|blog|leads|service_requests}, cc-accent-color, cc-accent-hex, cc-preset-{#hex}, cc-maintenance-toggle, cc-maintenance-message, cc-feature-{tools|services|brain|customs|intelligence|expo|academy|blog|trade_news}, cc-rate-{service-slug}, cc-save, cc-new-password, cc-change-password, brain-widget-fab, brain-widget-input, brain-widget-send, maintenance-screen, customs-tab-terms, nav-menu-{learn|explore}, nav-menu-item-{academy|blog|trade-news|products|corridors|countries|industries|expos-&-events|customs|intelligence}. Note: admin-login-username / admin-login-password testids are NOT present — use placeholder='Admin ID' / placeholder='Password'. Public Brain widget hidden on /admin* and /brain routes — test 'I am admin' from '/'.
rca_of_the_issue: n/a — feature acceptance run; no bugs found.
